description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline using microsoft/dotnet:1.1-sdk as the default Docker image and defining two jobs. In the build stage add a build-and-test job that runs ./install, then test/all, then ./ditto --help. In the deploy stage add a pages job that overrides the image to alpine:latest, runs cp -R docs/ public/, and publishes the public/ directory as a Pages artifact. The pages job should only run on the master branch.
